结节病.summary: 该病例报告了系统性结节病合并嗜酸性粒细胞性胃肠炎的罕见情况，提示嗜酸粒细胞增多可能预示严重疾病表型。

结节病.title: Multiparametric Ultrasound Findings of Testicular Sarcoidosis.
结节病.authors: Liu H, Abudalo R, Salahia G, Yusuf GT, Huang DY, Sidhu PS
结节病.summary: 睾丸结节病多表现为多发、双侧、低回声实性小结节，血流稀疏或无增强，质地中等偏软。

结节病.title: What Are HFpEF Mimics and What Are They Mimicking? Insights Into Our Conceptualization of Heart Failure With Preserved Ejection Fraction as a Disease.
结节病.authors: Packer M, Butler J, Ho JE, Lam CSP, Petrie MC, Schiattarella GG, Vaduganathan M, Zannad F, Borlaug BA
结节病.summary: HFpEF患者需排除心脏淀粉样变性等七类疾病，因其病理生理机制与标准HFpEF不同且有独特治疗。

结节病.title: Acute and Chronic Myocarditis in Men and Women.
结节病.authors: Ammirati E, Selimi A, Palazzini M, Conti N, Di Cicco M, Varrenti M, Conforme Torres DI, Cartella I, Sormani P, Santolamazza C, Farina A, Garascia A, Gentile P, Mori S
结节病.summary: 男性急性心肌炎更常见，但女性症状更重、住院死亡率更高。

结节病.title: Are Patients Who Have Sarcoidosis at Increased Risk of Adverse Postoperative Outcomes Following Total Knee Arthroplasty?
结节病.authors: Astavans A, Agarwal S, DePalo J, Garcia D, Suresh S, Thakkar S
结节病.summary: 文献结论：结节病患者行全膝关节置换术后，2年内翻修和机械并发症风险增高。

结节病.title: Nonsteroid treatment options in (pulmonary) sarcoidosis. When to consider and why?
结节病.authors: Spagnolo P, Miedema J
结节病.summary: 肺结节病初始治疗中，甲氨蝶呤与泼尼松疗效相当，且能避免激素副作用，支持治疗范式转变。

ILD.title: Rheumatoid arthritis-associated interstitial lung disease: screening, diagnosis, and treatment-an expert group consensus statement.
ILD.authors: Solomon JJ, Dieude P, Matson SM, Lee JS, Rojas-Serrano J, Sebastiani M, Gonzalez A, Demoruelle MK, Hoffman-Vold AM, Kam MLW, Swigris JJ, Sparks JA, Brown KK, Cottin V, Kellermeyer LM, Wilson KC, Waseda Y, Crestani B, Walsh SLF, Poletti V, Doyle T, Koduri G, Kelly C, Danoff S, Dellaripa PF
ILD.summary: 该共识声明为类风湿关节炎相关间质性肺病的筛查、诊断和治疗提供了多学科专家指导。

ILD.title: Lung disease in rheumatoid arthritis.
ILD.authors: Bendstrup E, Dieude P, Kreuter M, Hoffmann-Vold AM, Cottin V, Hauge EM
ILD.summary: 类风湿关节炎患者中，肺部疾病（如肺间质病、气道病及肺癌）常见且预后差，需高危CT筛查。

ILD.title: Lung ultrasound in interstitial lung disease: from bedside screening to prognostic integration and AI-assisted standardization.
ILD.authors: Yang J, Lin Y, Bai J, Zhu Z, Lian X
ILD.summary: 肺超声通过B线和胸膜异常评估，可作为间质性肺病床旁筛查、预后整合及AI辅助标准化的可靠工具。

ILD.title: A statistical model for lung function trajectory and mortality in patients with fibrotic interstitial lung disease.
ILD.journal: Am J Respir Crit Care Med
ILD.authors: Wendelberger B, Jensen TP, Quintana M, Stewart I, Molyneaux PL, Maher TM, Oldham JM, Johnson SR, Fahy WA, Khan F, Saini G, Abdulqawi R, Allen R, Baldi BG, Chaudhuri N, Corte TJ, Cottin V, Funke-Chambour M, Glaspole I, Holland AE, Johannson KA, Khor YH, Kreuter M, Kulkarni T, Molina-Molina M, Martinez FJ, Montesi SB, Nathan SD, Piccari L, Rajan S, Rivera-Ortega P, Ryerson CJ, Sakamoto K, Wain LV, Wells AU, Adams W, Kawano-Dourado L, Jenkins RG, Lewis RJ
ILD.summary: 该模型通过联合建模肺功能下降与死亡风险，比传统线性模型更准确估算肺纤维化患者的FVC年下降率。

ILD.title: Diagnostic significance of HRCT imaging features in idiopathic inflammatory myopathy-associated interstitial lung disease.
ILD.authors: Zhang QY, Li CY, Wang CC, Zhang DD, Shao HY, Zhang Y
ILD.summary: HRCT显示上肺野非特异性间质性肺炎和机化性肺炎特征有助于鉴别特发性炎性肌病相关间质性肺病。

ILD.title: The evolving comorbidity landscape of rheumatoid arthritis.
ILD.authors: Brooks RT, England BR, Kronzer VL, Crowson CS
ILD.summary: RA合并症谱系演变：间质性肺病、焦虑抑郁负担上升，生物制剂及靶向治疗普及是主要驱动因素。

ILD.title: Diagnostic, prognostic and therapeutic biomarkers in rheumatoid arthritis.
ILD.authors: Szekanecz Z, Gunkl-Toth L, Szamosi S, van der Woude D, McInnes I, Nagy G
ILD.summary: 类风湿关节炎亟需诊断和预后生物标志物，以实现早期干预和精准治疗。

ILD.title: Immunotherapy-related interstitial lung disease: a call to improve risk stratification and diagnostic consistency.
ILD.authors: Fabbri L, Antoniou K, Blum TG, Camus P, Cazes A, Chorostowska-Wynimko J, Foidart P, Hardavella G, Heuvelmans MA, Karampitsakos T, Kreuter M, Pereira Catarata MJ, Naidoo J, Passaro A, Peters S, Prosch H, Russell AM, Tarnoki DL, Porter JC, Guiot J
ILD.summary: 标准化ICI治疗前风险评估可改善免疫相关间质性肺病的早期诊疗，多学科协作至关重要。

ILD.title: Integrated machine learning risk model for predicting radiation pneumonitis in lung cancer patients with interstitial lung disease.
ILD.authors: Lu H, Jiang A, Yuan Z, Chen D
ILD.summary: 该机器学习模型整合临床、剂量和炎症指标可有效预测肺癌合并间质性肺病患者的放射性肺炎风险。

ILD.title: Lymphoid interstitial pneumonia in Sjogren disease: clinical course and comparison with other interstitial lung disease patterns.
ILD.authors: La Rocca G, Ferro F, Uggenti V, Dei B, Fulvio G, Moretti M, Morganti R, Sambataro G, Mosca M, Romei C, Baldini C
ILD.summary: 干燥综合征相关的淋巴细胞间质性肺炎预后良好，肺功能稳定，病程较其他间质性肺病更年轻。

ILD.title: Inhaled nitric oxide in fibrotic and advanced interstitial lung disease: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials.
ILD.authors: Nakahara S, Hirao Y, Fujiuchi B, Matsuda B
ILD.summary: 吸入一氧化氮未能显著改善间质性肺病患者的6分钟步行距离，且不良事件风险与安慰剂组相似。

ILD.title: The cell with many faces: lung macrophage plasticity and function in response to environmental and pathogenic insults.
ILD.authors: Dubey S, Khan J, Alishlash AS, Matalon S
ILD.summary: 肺泡巨噬细胞可响应环境与病原刺激，在促炎与抗炎表型间动态转换，其功能紊乱驱动慢性肺病。

ILD.title: Temporal Trends in Antineoplastic Agent-associated Interstitial Lung Disease Involving Immune Checkpoint Inhibitors in the JADER Database.
ILD.authors: Ibayashi Y, Watanabe H, Shimura Y, Nishiyama Y, Sai Y, Suga Y
ILD.summary: 日本2016-2024年间抗肿瘤药物相关间质性肺炎报告率较前明显升高，主要归因于免疫检查点抑制剂使用的增加。

ILD.title: Mechanisms of Surfactant Maturation in Development and Disease.
ILD.authors: Pranty AI, Cuevas Ocana S, Dickens JA
ILD.summary: 肺表面活性物质成熟异常可导致从新生儿呼吸衰竭到成人间质性肺病的多种疾病。

ILD.title: Telomere biology disorders in childhood interstitial lung disease: new insights from the chILD-EU cohort.
ILD.authors: Courtwright A
ILD.summary: 摘要缺失。

ILD.title: Predictors of rapidly progressive interstitial lung disease in anti-MDA5 dermatomyositis: a meta-analysis.
ILD.authors: Liu T, Ji X, Wei Y, Zhong Y, Zhu J, Wang C, Li M
ILD.summary: 该荟萃分析发现年龄、男性、发热、皮肤溃疡、关节炎及CRP和LDH水平升高是抗MDA5皮肌炎相关快速进展性间质性肺病的预测因素。

ILD.title: Personalized treatment of HER2-positive lung adenocarcinoma using Human Organoid Drug Sensitivity Test.
ILD.authors: Luan T, Fu S, Liu W, Wang S, Xie X, Lin X, Chenli Z, Wang L, Ma K, Ma H, Mo J, Yu B, Yang Q, Xu Y, Jin H, Chen Q, Yao L, Luan Y, Zhong N, Lv Q, Zhang Y, Zhou C
ILD.summary: 人源类器官药敏测试可指导HER2突变肺腺癌耐药后治疗。

ILD.title: Nintedanib combined with dual immunosuppression for interstitial lung disease in systemic sclerosis and rheumatoid arthritis: A systematic review and pooled multicentre real-world cohort study.
ILD.authors: Chioni A, Campochiaro C, Keret S, Panopoulos S, Baresic M, Varelas G, Radic M, Sebastiani M, Tektonidou MG, Sfikakis PP, Rimar D, Matucci-Cerinic M, Daoussis D
ILD.summary: 尼达尼布联合双免疫抑制治疗可稳定系统性硬化症相关间质性肺病的肺功能，并改善皮肤评分。

ILD.title: Impact of pre-transplantation exposure to immunosuppressive agents on lung transplant outcomes in interstitial lung disease.
ILD.authors: Tazibet K, Bunel V, Mal H, Goletto T, Halitim P, Morer L, Mouren D, Salpin M, Sandot A, Weisenburger G, Montravers P, Atchade E, Tanaka S, Frija J, Hajouji L, Castier Y, Mordant P, Crestani B, Borie R, El Husseini K
ILD.summary: ILD患者移植前使用免疫抑制剂增加术后死亡、严重并发症和感染风险。

ILD.title: Use of Bronchoscopic Cryobiopsy in Evaluating Interstitial Lung Disease: Radiologic Predictors of Diagnostic Yield and Safety.
ILD.authors: Charokopos A, Tzouvelekis A, Stultz B, Koo CW, Kruger L, Woodworth CF, Yi ES, Tzavara C, Kern R, Baqir M, Moua T, Ryu JH
ILD.summary: 支气管镜下肺冷冻活检诊断间质性肺病安全有效，CT蜂窝征会使诊断率降低82%。
